## What happened
PIX11 reported on March 20, 2026, that a pet food recall was issued after products were found to be potentially contaminated with Salmonella, Listeria, and E. coli.

## Key facts
- Pathogens: Salmonella, Listeria, and E. coli
- Product type: pet food
- Affected pets: other
- Source date: March 20, 2026

## What pet owners should do
Do not feed the recalled pet food; sanitize bowls and storage areas; monitor for symptoms; and consult a veterinarian promptly if signs of infection occur.
